<Badge text="postgres" variant="note" /> <Badge text="18 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Inspect first" variant="caution" /> <Badge text="inspect-then-install" variant="default" />

> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add planetscale/database-skills --skill postgres --skill mysql -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/postgres`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/postgres.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add planetscale/database-skills --skill postgres --skill mysql -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Plan and review PostgreSQL / PlanetScale Postgres schema, indexing, query tuning, transactions, operations, MVCC, replication, connection issues, PlanetScale-specific features (pooling, CLI insights). Use for create/modify tables/indexes/queries, migrations, troubleshooting.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add planetscale/database-skills --skill postgres --skill mysql -y -g -a antigravity, claude-code, codex, crush, cursor, gemini-cli, github-copilot, grok, opencode` status=inspect-then-install; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[planetscale/database-skills](https://github.com/planetscale/database-skills) (PlanetScale, MIT)

## Comparable Alternatives

Prisma DB skills, general SQL/Postgres skills, local db docs.

&gt; From repo README + skills/ 2026.
